display.purpose: Hero headline only, one per page.

motion.name: spring-tactile
motion.purpose: Primary button hover/tap scale (CtaButton) — 1.05 on hover, 0.9 on tap.

motion.name: ease-scroll-reveal
motion.purpose: Framer Motion whileInView fade + translateY(20px to 0) on section entry.

motion.name: ease-hover-fill
motion.purpose: HoverLink pill fill-sweep scale(0) to scale(1).

motion.name: marquee-scroll
motion.purpose: Client logo strip horizontal scroll, pauses on hover.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Pill-shaped primary CTA with spring hover/tap scale and a radial hover glow. Canonical action button across the marketing page.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { position: relative; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 9999px; background: #FF5A1F; color: #ffffff; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 10px 24px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF8C5A; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Nav Pill Link
components.description: Ghost nav link with an ember-orange fill that sweeps in from center on hover.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-link-fill { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: #FF5A1F; border-radius: 9999px; transform: scale(0); transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover .ds-nav-link-fill { transform: scale(1); } .ds-nav-link-text { position: relative; z-index: 1; color: #7A7367; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover .ds-nav-link-text { color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Pain Point Card
components.description: Flat, tonal card with a nested icon box. No shadow — elevation from the surface-color step against the page background.
components.html:
Telefony, SMS-y, arkusze Excela

Każda rezerwacja to ręczna robota — potwierdzenia, zmiany terminu, ryzyko podwójnej rezerwacji.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; background: #EBE5DC; border-radius: 16px; padding: 32px; outline: 1px solid rgba(20,20,20,0.1); } .ds-card-icon { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; background: #F2EDE6; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-card-icon svg { width: 24px; height: 24px; color: #FF5A1F; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Syne, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.25rem; color: #141414; margin: 0; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #7A7367; margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Transparent field with a sand-colored stroke that shifts to ember-orange with a soft ring on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 32px; width: 100%; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #DDD6CB; background: transparent; padding: 4px 10px; font-size: 1rem; color: #141414; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #7A7367; } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: #FF5A1F; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,90,31,0.5); }

components.name: Navbar
components.description: Sticky, blurred navbar with logo, pill nav links, and a primary CTA. Shrinks and gains opacity on scroll.
components.html:
WeUnite
Co robimy
components.css: .ds-navbar { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 50; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 16px 24px; background: rgba(242,237,230,0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid #DDD6CB; } .ds-navbar-logo { font-family: Syne, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 1.25rem; color: #141414; text-decoration: none; } .ds-navbar-links { display: flex; gap: 8px; }

components.name: Gradient Blob
components.description: Decorative radial gradient (Ember Orange to Warm Coral Glow to transparent) with a slow drift animation. Hero and CTA sections only, always non-interactive.
components.css: .ds-blob { position: absolute; top: -10%; right: -5%; width: 700px; height: 700px; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle, #FF5A1F 0%, #FF8C5A 40%, transparent 70%); opacity: 0.35; filter: blur(80px); pointer-events: none; animation: ds-blob-drift 12s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } @keyframes ds-blob-drift { 0% { transform: translate(0,0) scale(1); } 33% { transform: translate(-30px,20px) scale(1.05); } 66% { transform: translate(20px,-25px) scale(0.97); } 100% { transform: translate(-15px,15px) scale(1.03); } }

narrative.overview: WeUnite's landing page reads like golden-hour light on a warm interior: toasted cream and ash surfaces, one confident ember-orange accent, and massive Syne display type that carries the pitch without needing decoration to prove it. Nothing here is corporate-cold or Silicon-Valley sterile — the palette and type are warm on purpose, because the product being sold is trust from small business owners who are used to being pitched by agencies that feel neither warm nor capable. The system explicitly rejects the cheap, dated, Wix-template feel of the sites WeUnite exists to replace: no clutter, no mismatched stock photography, no inconsistent spacing. Every section is built to demonstrate the same craft quality being sold, so the page functions as its own case study.
keyCharacteristics: Warm neutral base (cream to ash surface to charred-umber) with a single high-energy accent
Syne ExtraBold display type as the primary hierarchy tool, not decoration
Flat, tonal depth (ring outlines, surface-color steps) — no drop shadows anywhere
Pill-shaped interactive elements against softer 16-24px container radii
Spring-physics micro-interactions rather than linear easing

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Ember Orange is the only saturated color on the page. Warm Coral Glow only ever appears blended into it inside a gradient blob.

rules.name: The Single-Voice Rule
rules.body: Only Syne is allowed to be loud (ExtraBold, oversized). DM Sans never goes above medium weight or above text-xl.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Never introduce box-shadow for card, button, or panel elevation. Depth comes from surface-color stepping and a 1px ring-foreground/10 outline only.

dos: Do keep Ember Orange to a single accent role — CTAs, active states, icons, focus rings.
Do use rounded-full for every primary clickable action and reserve 16-24px radii for containers.
Do convey elevation via surface-color stepping and ring-1 ring-foreground/10 only.
Do use spring-physics hover/tap scale on interactive elements, not linear opacity fades.
Do guard every scroll/hover animation with useReducedMotion.
Do reference Tailwind utility names mapped in @theme inline — never the raw CSS variable syntax.
donts: Don't use bg-[--bg-base] or any other raw bg-[--css-var] syntax.
Don't let this page drift toward cheap local-business site territory: no mismatched stock photography, no cluttered layouts, no inconsistent section spacing.
Don't use border-left/border-right colored stripes as an accent on cards or callouts.
Don't default to glassmorphism outside the navbar's functional scroll blur.
Don't reach for a modal as the first solution to a UI problem.
Don't add a second saturated accent color alongside Ember Orange.
